header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Experience Partner / HRBP professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing people programs grounded in evidence, and partnering with managers and stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.
